description:
In this video, I go over some of the best drumkits you can use as a new producer in 2023. I talk about what to look for in a kit to see if it's what you need, some places to get free kits, and a few of my personal favorite paid ones. I also cook up a fire beat from scratch using only stock plugins to showcase one of my favorite kits.

0:00 Intro
0:53 How to Find the Right Kit
1:37 FREE Kits
1:54 My Go-To Kits
2:59 Cooking a Beat with Stock Plugins
12:28 Outro

-----
📦 Kits Featured in this Video (use code YOUTUBE20 for a discount):

FREE Kits: 
https://theproducercrate.com/collections/free

Industry Standard Trap Drumkit: https://theproducercrate.com/collections/featured-picks/products/industry-standard-drumkit-v1
